faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer:
The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.

faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.

placements.overview:
Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS), also known as SSSUTMS, is a private university located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The university offers 98 courses in total, including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc, M.Sc, MCA, BCA, B.Com, B.A, B.Arch, B.Des, B.Pharma, BBA, B.A.M.S. and After 10th Diploma. The 34 specialisations provided by the SSSUTMS include Physics, Power Engineering, Radiotherapy Technology, Structural Engineering, Textile Design, VLSI Design, Zoology. The total seats present in the university are 3810. Additionally, the university offers UG, PG and After 10th courses, delivering Degree and Diploma to the students.

SSSUTMS placements are decent, when compared with other institutes. Considering fees as an important decision-making factor, the average fees to be paid in the university ranges between . Also, its courses are approved by some of the eminent recognizing bodies such as CoA, AICTE and PCI. Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS) courses are listed in a total of 15 streams, including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Nursing, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Humanities & Social Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Design, Law, Hospitality & Travel, Beauty & Fitness and Teaching & Education. Furthermore, Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS) Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh courses are taught in Full Time mode.

A. The University has a Research and Development Department (RDD) that helps students to conduct research-related activities.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1 LPA, and the average was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Many companies gave placements to students from lower college students, and the highest placement was given to M Pharmacy students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.

review_content.Placements: There is no such news of placement in SSSUTMS. During my 2 years of college, I haven't heard about any placement in my Aeronautical department. Otherwise, there might be placements that might have happened in the computer science department. Once, there was a notice issue about an industrial visit, but it never happened.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA to 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, Makind, Abbott, etc. Around 60% of students get placed by Abbott, Mankind, and Cipla. Other students do not get placements because they get frustrated with this college. Because the college does not give the hope and experience that students want, they do not motivate them and they treat them only for fees.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.

review_content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies that come here for recruiting are TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. No internship was offered to us by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023

review_content.Placements: Our college has no placements; not a single company visited. According to previous records, the staff says the average package was 10 LPA, but there was not a single placement in my session.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. They have a very old course curriculum, and the university does not update it. The passing percentage is good, but I do not know how students pass because the teachers are not interested in teaching.

review_content.Placements: The lowest salary was 2.5 Lacs and the highest was 8.1 Lacs. A few of my classmates are working in various hospitals and some are self-employed. 70 percent students were placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the hostel is great. We had to go to the labs and library every day which was a good experience. The hostel was very comfortable and all the students had a great time. The sports days were especially memorable.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty are very respectful and the whole campus has a family friendly atmosphere. The only downside is that the campus has some issues with internet connectivity but our teachers are very understanding and patient with us. The pass percentage is also very high with most students scoring in the 90 percentile or higher.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by SSSUTMS for admission to B.A.M.S.?
faqs.answer: The main entrance exam accepted is the *NEET*, which stands for National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for the admission to the B.A.M.S. programme in SSSUTMS. It is a common entrance conducted by National Testing Agency across India for B.A.M.S. programs in the private and government institutions in the country.A qualifying score in NEET is required for admission since it is a statutory requirement for medical and allied health Science courses. Then, the admission is based on counseling and cutoffs as per the NEET score and availability of seats.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college dissatisfy.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews.review_heading: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was decent; it was vast and the environment was also quite decent. There were all kinds of labs like the computer lab, chemistry lab, and others. Talking about the hostel facility, it was also decent, and the quality of food was acceptable. There were separate girls' and boys' hostels in this college, and the fee was around 12,000 for a year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the hostel is great. We had to go to the labs and library every day which was a good experience. The hostel was very comfortable and all the students had a great time. The sports days were especially memorable.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The course was very good. Facilities and infrastructure were good in the pharmacy department. Wi-Fi facility was available. Classrooms were the best and a useful library was available. Canteen food was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college plays a vital role in the development as the students were now focusing on the laboratories, classrooms, etc., while selecting a college. Computing resources were one of the important and mandatory needs of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure, staff, teachers, canteen and playground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. They also provide good quality facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, hostels, mess, canteen, medical, and playground. Our college also organises many sports events, quiz types competitions and many entertaining occasions.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members in this college.
reviews.review_text: Both boys and girls hostels are available in our college. Our college also has public Wi-Fi facility and all subjects labs. A hospital is available for medical facilities, and games and sports are organised here. Apart from this, many faculty members from outside the college visit our college for expert lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Stay away unless you don't love your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is of top-class undoubtedly. But there is no benefit of having a good infrastructure if college is not offering quality education. There are good labs and classrooms, but they are of no use if they are not providing quality education. Stay away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: Never choose for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are several buildings, and there is a space for games like football and cricket. They have huge infrastructure and a lot of open spaces for playground and canteen. It's close to Pachama railway station and further connected to Sehore-Bhopal road. The infrastructure is in good condition, and it has an awesome location, and it is a cool place.

reviews.review_heading: Good management and also pharmacy departments are good.
reviews.review_text: Good in infrastructure but amenities cleanliness are not up to date. Higher tier grasses are grown in the garden areas. Water is not available in the summer due to this classes of hostel student are mostly absent. The college management is not working for the student but working for their self.

reviews.review_heading: An infrastructure oriented college with generous faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college is only concentrating on its infrastructure, but not on the environment-friendly infrastructure. It just contains the buildings. They do not have a good canteen although remaining things are nice and infrastructure is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is world-class. Classrooms would be empty after 1st semester due to the unavailability of faculty members. The hostel facility is available. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are not applicable, and you would not get any help here if you like sports. Labs are not available.

paragraphs: Visvesvaraya Technological University admissionis done based onmerit and entrance-baseddepending on the course. VTU accept distinct national-level entrance exams, likewiseKCET, CMAT, GATE, JEE Main, etc. The University gives over 10 degree and diploma programmes across its seven departments, likewise, Aerospace Engineering, Applied Science, Civil Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Also known asVTU, the university gives MTech and MBA as famous courses which are given in full-time mode. Interested students can read the below article to learn all about the admission criteria and procedure for VTU courses.

Visvesvaraya Technological Universityaccepts various national-level entrance exams for admission to its given courses. students should apply for the course-wise entrance exam. However, before applying students must qualify for the eligibility and selection criteria for the desired programme. The table below mentions the basic eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularVTU courses:

Visvesvaraya Technological University feesrange from 10,000 to INR 30 lakh. The VTU offers the courses via its 208 affiliated, one constituent, and 17 autonomous colleges under its jurisdiction. Therefore, the fees and seats tabulated below are the overall numbers offered:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Visvesvaraya Technological University has a multi- admission process. The admission may vary as per the affiliated colleges/constituents. Find below the common admission procedure as per VTU's admission guidelines:
1: Application process

students must visit the official website and select the programme they want to apply to. The application process requires students to fill out the online application form with all the required details and attach all relevant documents and certificates.
2: Interview, entrance exam, and GP

students' application forms will be scrutinised and selection will be made based on the eligibility criteria. Selected students will be invited for a counselling interview. students can choose any options for the interview process, which are one-on-one, online, or telephonic. Additionally, students must also appear for the entrance exam, personal interview, and group discussion as per the programme requirements.
3: Merit List/Cutoff/Counseling

Wait for the merit list to be announced by the college. The merit list will be based on the entrance exam scores and other criteria such cutoffs, academic performance, work experience, etc. Attend the counselling process and follow the guidelines provided by the college. The counselling process will involve document verification, seat allotment, fee payment, etc.
3: Seat offer

Once the application process and interviews are completed, the college admission official sends an admission offer to the students. Candidate must accept the offer by confirming it and paying the course fees.

faqs.question: Does VTU Belgaum accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: The undergraduate admissions at our institute are conducted through a comprehensive evaluation process that considers scores from various entrance exams. Specifically, for engineering programs, the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE Main) plays a pivotal role in assessing the candidates' aptitude and knowledge in the field. Additionally, for courses related to architecture, the Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET) is a key determinant in the admission process, emphasizing the importance of subject-specific assessments.On the other hand, postgraduate admissions offer a diverse range of programs including M.Tech, M.Arch, MBA, MCA, and MCA (Lateral). This variety reflects the institute's commitment to providing advanced education across multiple disciplines. The Master of Technology (M.Tech) and Master of Architecture (M.Arch) programs cater to individuals seeking specialisation in engineering and architecture, respectively.For those inclined towards management, the Master of Business Admin

faqs.question: How are BTech placements at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The BTech placements at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) are quite good. UVCE has a placement rate of 90%, which is one of the highest among engineering colleges in India. More than 98% of students in the ISE and CSE branches get placed in UVCE, and the highest salary package offered in the previous year was 40 LPA. Around 115 companies have visited UVCE so far for the 2023 Batch Students and more than 353 offers have been made to students across various streams.

faqs.question: Are there any good placements in VTU for MBA students?
faqs.answer: The placements at VTU have shown an increasing trend over the previous years. The median package offered to MBA students at VTU increased from INR 3.5 LPA in 20221 to INR 3.65 LPA in 2022. Many new recruiters are getting on-board for the placement drive at VTU each year.

nirf.description:
VTU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for VTU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, VTU fell 26 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, VTU fell 82 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, VTU fell 28 ranks to #50 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

paragraphs: The total fee for a BTech course at the University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) ranges from INR 45,000 - INR 30 lakh. The BTech fees varies across the VTU's affiliated college. The fee is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The fees for BTech programmes at University Visvesvaraya College of Engineering (UVCE) can be paid through the following methods:KCET fees can be paid through RTGS.University and exam fees can be paid online.No extra fee needs to be paid at UVCE other than the fee paid to KEA at the time of downloading the admission order

The Visvesvaraya Technological University BSc fee structure includes the tuition fees, registration fees, e-consortium fee, student sports fees, etc. The tuition fee is the most major component of the fee structure. It ranges from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 3.8 lakh for various specialisations. The fee amount differs for the students from and outside of Karnataka. The fee mentioned information is taken from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence indicative.

The students of MBA at VTU can apply for various scholarships being run by the State Government of Karnataka. For scholarships provided by the state government, students can apply at the State Scholarship Portal of the Karnataka government. The process for application and the scholarship helpline number is also available at the official website of VTU.

college_info.intro:
Global BIFS Academy offers Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking (PGCRB) as the flagship programme. However, it offers various other programmes in the BFSI sector in full-time mode. The programme includes case studies, NISM certification (mutual fund), HR workshops, interview preparation and mock interviews, and campus recruitment training (CRT).
The duration of the course is 120 days and is appropriate for the graduates and post-graduates with an intent to work in the banking sector. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation/post-graduation secured from a UGC recognised institute. The age limit of the course is 28 years. highlights.summary:
Established in 2012, The Indira Gandhi Technological and Medical Sciences University, popularly known as IGTAMSU, is an ISO 9001:2015 Certified University based in Ziro, Arunachal Pradesh. It was founded under the Indira Gandhi Technological and Medical Sciences University Act 2012 by the Government of Arunachal Pradesh.

IGTAMSU comprises four faculties namely Faculty of Medical Sciences, Faculty of Law and Juridical Sciences, Faculty of Social Sciences and Faculty of Sciences which further include 11 departments. Additionally, this University features a specialised Vocational Course Division offering courses like BVoc and MVoc across multiple disciplines. It also offers UG, PG, doctorate, certificate, diploma and postgraduate diploma programmes in streams like Yoga, Physiotherapy, Nursing, Pharmacy, Management, Law, Engineering, etc.

The process of IGTAMSU admission is open for students in both online and offline modes. Admission is granted on first-come-first-serve basis in case the candidate fulfils the basic eligibility criteria laid down by the University. Since there are multiple departments in the University, eligibility for some courses is set differently, as enlisted below:

The Indira Gandhi Technological and Medical Sciences University offers a vast range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Medical Science, Commerce, Arts, Law, Management, to name a few. Given below are the eligibility criteria and fee structure for topmost IGTAMSU courses:

This University does not offer any scholarship schemes on its own but students have the option of availing scholarship/stipend either from the Government of India or Government of Arunachal Pradesh. The University issues bonafide student certificate to eligible students on receiving the admission application form along with original migration certificate.

individual_reviews.title: Swami Sarvanand Institute of Management and Technology, Dinanagar.

content.Placements: Placements in our college for B.Sc. Agriculture is almost negligible. Hardly 5–10% of students get placed, and even then, it is usually in low-paying, field-level jobs. Most students have to search for jobs on their own or prepare for government exams. This information is meant to give a realistic picture, not to discourage admission.
content.Infrastructure: College has basic infrastructure such as classrooms, a library, and laboratories, but most of the equipment is outdated and not well-maintained. Hostel facilities are average, and the mess food is below standard. However, the college staff is very good and supportive.

review_content.Placements: From Term 4, students become eligible for placements. A lot of companies visit campus, such as Deloitte, ICICI, HDFC, Tresvista, Oracle, Genpact, Wipro, etc. Around 200+ offers have been made so far. The highest package was 14 LPA, and the average package is 6.5-7 LPA. Around 95% of the students are placed, and the process is still ongoing. I plan to start my job soon.
review_content.Infrastructure: The annual management fest of Maharana Pratap College of Technology (MPCT) is called IMPELZ. We have two more fests, which are Ace Connect and Periodos. The library has more than 30,000 books. Classrooms are well designed with a step-up structure. We have huge whiteboards, projectors, in-class computers, and biometric attendance systems. There are many sports facilities, including basketball, football, volleyball, and cricket. All clubs and committees are student-driven.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: From the 6th semester onwards, students become eligible for campus placements, but if we are skilled enough, we can easily apply for off-campus opportunities whenever we want. More than 50 companies visit the college, and the average package is between 5-6 LPA. The highest package offered is by Amazon at 41 LPA. Over 90% of the students are placed. After getting my degree, I plan to opt for a master's (M.Tech) after 1-2 years of work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library here is very good, with a lot of books available; we can find nearly every book we need, and the library is fully air-conditioned. There are plenty of extracurricular activities in the college; we can play basketball and cricket, and there are clubs for dancing, singing, photography, robotics, coding, painting, acting, and more. Whatever hobbies we have, the college has a club for them. The various college clubs include the Coding Wizard Club, Codex Club, Hack Club ITER, Google Developer Student Club ITER, SOA Photography Club, Virtual Showreel, and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It was a good college before 2019. I do not recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Not a single company visits the college, but many students get off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. I am a day scholar. You can spend your time in college. Labs are not proper.
review_content.Faculty: There is a shortage of faculty members. Exams are conducted in the college itself, so passing the exams is easy. Question papers are set by RGPV University. The question papers are not very tough. The best thing is that we can write the exams at our college, and teachers are also available to help us.

paragraphs: Vindhya Institute of Management and Research, Satna admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in several specialisations.Vindhya Institute of Management and Research, Satnaoffers BBA and BCA at UG level and MBA/PGDM at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. Aspirants have to payINR 45,600for PG courses.
